Definition: Logical model for reporting a laboratory result in Zimbabwe. Covers all data elements defined in activity ZW.LAB.A2 of the Zimbabwe Lab DAK data dictionary.
Review/publication state of the result report in the laboratory workflow.
Date and time the result was submitted.
Date and time the result was verified/issued.
Measured/observed value of the test result.
Unit of measure for the result value (UCUM). Required when the result is a quantity.
Status of the individual result (e.g. preliminary, final, amended).
Method used to produce the result.
Reason(s) the specimen was rejected by the laboratory, if applicable.
